phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Two Towers are
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si trovano le Due Torri?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see TROH-vah-noh leh DOO-eh TOR-ree?
phrases.cultural_note: The Two Towers — Asinelli and Garisenda — are the symbol of Bologna and visible from much of the centro storico.

responses.english: Straight ahead, at the end of this street.
responses.phonetic: DREET-toh, al ter-MEE-neh dee KWES-tah VEE-ah.
responses.local: Dritto, al termine di questa via.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to eat real Bolognese ragù
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove posso mangiare un vero ragù bolognese?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh POS-soh man-JAH-reh oon VEH-roh rah-GOO boh-loh-NYEH-zeh?
phrases.cultural_note: Bolognese ragù is always served with tagliatelle — never spaghetti — in Bologna.

responses.english: At Rodrigo's, on Via della Zecca.
responses.phonetic: dah roh-DREE-goh, een VEE-ah DEL-lah DZEK-kah.
responses.local: Da Rodrigo, in Via della Zecca.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which portico to walk for the best atmosphere
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quale portico è più caratteristico?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-leh por-TEE-koh eh PYOO kah-rat-teh-REES-tee-koh?
phrases.cultural_note: Bologna has 38 km of porticoes, inscribed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 2021.

responses.english: The San Luca portico, without question.
responses.phonetic: eel por-TEE-koh dee san LOO-kah, SEN-tsah DOOB-byoh.
responses.local: Il portico di San Luca, senza dubbio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest pharmacy is
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è una farmacia qui vicino?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh OO-nah far-MAH-chah kwee vee-CHEE-noh?

responses.english: Yes, on Piazza Maggiore, on the right.
responses.phonetic: see, een PYAHT-tsah mahj-JOH-reh, ah DES-trah.
responses.local: Sì, in Piazza Maggiore, a destra.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the historic center is safe to walk at night
phrases.text_local: Scusi, il centro storico è sicuro la sera?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, eel CHEN-troh STOH-ree-koh eh see-KOO-roh lah SEH-rah?

responses.english: Yes, it's very busy even at night.
responses.phonetic: see, eh MOL-toh freh-kwen-TAH-toh AN-keh dee NOT-teh.
responses.local: Sì, è molto frequentato anche di notte.
